name: WarPigs Craft Kitchen
tagline: Slow-smoked craft BBQ from Sonoma County.
seoDescription: WarPigs Craft Kitchen in Cotati, CA serves 12-hour smoked meats, scratch-made sides, and full-service catering rooted in Modern Americana comfort food. Pitmaster Larry Hillix has smoked craft barbecue since 2011.

images.heroAlt: Slow-smoked craft BBQ from WarPigs Craft Kitchen in Cotati

sections.heading: 12-hour smoked meats, made the hard way
sections.subheading: Pitmaster Larry Hillix has been slow-smoking craft barbecue for Sonoma County since 2011 — real bark, scratch-made sides, and sauces built from his own blend of spices and rubs.

image.alt: Slow-smoked craft BBQ from WarPigs Craft Kitchen

items.label: Low and slow on the smoker

sections.heading: Precision and quality, around the grill
body: In 2011, owner and pitmaster Larry Hillix decided Sonoma County was ready for WarPigs BBQ, building a craft kitchen on a special blend of spices and rubs inspired by Gary Park of G's Slow Smoked BBQ. The idea was simple: pair real precision and quality with the familiar flavors of hanging out with family around the grill.

Today WarPigs is a Northern California craft kitchen drawing on classic American comfort food, Southern smokehouse tradition, and seasonal California ingredients — meats smoked low and slow up to twelve hours, sides made from scratch, and sauces poured by hand.
highlights: Smoked low and slow up to 12 hours
Special blend of spices and rubs

sections.heading: Built around the smoker
sections.intro: Everything starts with the pit — pulled pork, brisket, ribs, and wings, then piled high or plated with sides made from scratch.

items.description: Custom menus for weddings, corporate events, and private gatherings across Sonoma County.

items.quote: The bbq pork sandwich was perfect. The sides are great as well.
items.author: Yelp reviewer

sections.heading: A little smoke, a lot of flavor

images.alt: Smoked meats from WarPigs Craft Kitchen

sections.heading: Hungry yet?
sections.body: Come by 8492 Gravenstein Hwy in Cotati, or call us to cater your next event. We'll bring the smoke.

sections.heading: Smoked low, served high
sections.subheading: Twelve hours on the pit, scratch-made sides, and house sauces — plus full-service catering for whatever you're throwing.

items.title: 12-Hour Smoked Pulled Pork Sandwich
items.description: Our signature. Pork smoked low and slow for twelve hours, hand-pulled into crispy bark and velvety shreds, stacked on toasted brioche and finished with a tangy red sauce. The sandwich the regulars come back for.

items.title: Dirty Fries
items.description: A pile of fries loaded with cheese, BBQ sauce, pulled pork, and coleslaw — half side, half meal, all the smokehouse in one basket.

items.title: Smoked Meats
items.description: Brisket, ribs, smoked chicken wings, and house-made sausage off the pit. Tender, bark-edged, and built on our own blend of spices and rubs.

items.title: Scratch-Made Sides
items.description: Fried Brussels sprouts, onion rings, and house coleslaw — made from scratch to stand up to the smoke, not hide behind it.

items.title: Full-Service Catering
items.description: Custom menus for weddings, corporate events, and private gatherings across Sonoma County. We bring the smoker, the spread, and the crew — you bring the guests.

items.a: We're at 8492 Gravenstein Hwy in Cotati, CA, serving Sonoma County craft BBQ.
We're open seven days a week, 11:30am to 8:00pm.
We do — full-service catering with custom menus for weddings, corporate events, and private gatherings across Sonoma County. Call (707) 508-5551 to plan yours.
Yes. WarPigs regularly hosts pop-ups and collaborations with local breweries, wineries, and community venues — follow us on Instagram and Facebook for where we'll be next.

sections.heading: Plan a catering spread
sections.body: Weddings, company parties, backyard blowouts — tell us the crowd and we'll build the menu.

sections.heading: A Sonoma County craft kitchen, built on smoke
sections.subheading: Real precision and quality, paired with the familiar flavors of hanging out with family around the grill.

sections.heading: Larry Hillix & the WarPigs pit
body: In 2011, owner and pitmaster Larry Hillix decided Sonoma County was ready for WarPigs BBQ, building a craft kitchen on a special blend of spices and rubs inspired by Gary Park of G's Slow Smoked BBQ. The idea was simple: pair real precision and quality with the familiar flavors of hanging out with family around the grill.

Today WarPigs is a Northern California craft kitchen drawing on classic American comfort food, Southern smokehouse tradition, and seasonal California ingredients. Beyond the kitchen they cater corporate events, weddings, and private gatherings, and regularly host pop-ups with local breweries, wineries, and community venues.

sections.heading: What comes out of the smoke
Come by, or book us to cater
